programme.title: Take Me Home Tonight
programme.desc: It's the late 1980s, when Wall Street is riding high, and it seems as if the entire country is cashing in on the bumper profits. Disgusted with the materialism that surrounds him, Matt Franklin, a brilliant young MIT graduate, has walked out on his well-paid position at a local lab and taken a low-level job as a video clerk, much to his father Bill's consternation. And the crises keep piling up in Matt's life. His best buddy Barry has just gotten fired from his job, his brainy sister Wendy is getting hitched to her vapid boyfriend Kyle, and the gorgeous Tori Frederking, long-time object of Matt's unattainable adoration, is suddenly back in the picture. Now, on one wild, woolly and irresponsible evening, everything is coming to a head, with explosive results.

programme.title: A Midnight Clear

With common ground established, the German platoon offer to be "captured" and a phony battle is staged to save honor. However, a tragic misunderstanding has devastating consequences in this powerful depiction of war's insanity.

programme.title: Hawaii, A Journey Through The Big Island
programme.desc: Experience Big Island bliss in the stunning 2 hour relaxing nature film. Soar above waterfalls that plunge into the Pacific, kick back with views of beach sunsets and slow motion waves, enjoy island palms in the gentle island breezes, and experience the Waipi'o valley paradise from above. Dazzling cinematography is accompanied by a relaxing soundtrack. Run time 2 hours.

programme.title: Magic of Zion
programme.desc: Experience the magnificent Zion National Park in its autumn splendor! Brilliant autumn colors combine with the warm red tones of Zion's dramatic cliffs to create a visual feast like no other in" Magic of Zion". Also included is rare footage of the endangered American Condor, the largest flying land bird in North America. Watch as a wild parent Condor feeds and nurtures its fledgling on the cliffs of Zion, an awe inspiring sight since there used to be only 50 condors in existence. Runtime 82 minutes.

programme.title: Fjords & Waterfalls of Norway
programme.desc: Experience the awe inspiring waterfalls and fjords of Norway in this 90 minute relaxing nature film. Soar down plummeting waterfalls and over the dramatic cliffs that plunge into the blue waters of remote fjords. Glimpse historic fishing villages accessible only by boat and relax to the calming soundtrack that accompanies the inspiring scenery.

programme.title: The Pacific Coast
programme.desc: Experience the natural beauty of the Pacific Coast from Washington State to Southern California. See breathtaking video of spectacular sunsets and iconic locations along the Big Sur coast. programme.title: They Call Him Cemetery 1971
programme.desc: In They Call Him Cemetery, two young brothers new to the frontier find themselves targeted by ruthless gunslingers and corrupt land barons. Just when all hope seems lost, a mysterious drifter known only as Cemetery (Gianni Garko) rides in. With nerves of steel and lightning-fast guns, he becomes their unlikely protector in a land where survival depends on the speed of your draw. Gritty, stylish, and action-packed, this Spaghetti Western delivers vengeance, justice, and the legend of a man called Cemetery.

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.

programme.title: Young Bill Hickok 1940
programme.desc: Roy Rogers saddles up in Young Bill Hickok, an action-packed Western adventure inspired by the early days of the legendary frontier hero. As war clouds gather over a divided nation, Hickok faces treacherous outlaws, secret Confederate plots, and high-stakes gun battles that threaten the peace of the West. With courage, quick draw, and a song on his lips, Rogers brings larger-than-life charm to this thrilling tale of loyalty, justice, and the making of a legend.

programme.title: The Desperate Mission 1969
programme.desc: In The Desperate Mission, Ricardo Montalbán stars as the legendary Joaquin Murrieta, the Mexican folk hero branded an outlaw by those who stole his land and destroyed his family. With a price on his head, he leads a daring fight against corruption, injustice, and betrayal across the California frontier. Filled with adventure, romance, and rebellion, this made-for-TV Western brings the legend of Murrieta to life with passion and fire.

programme.desc: The CBS 4 Nightly News Team presents a report on the major news events of the day and the details of late breaking news stories along with the latest sports updates, Palm Springs area weather conditions and the weather forecast for tomorrow.

programme.title: Newschannel 3 in the Morning
programme.desc: The NewsChannel 3 Team provides a first in-depth look at overnight local, regional, statewide and national news events as well as up-to-the-minute business news, sports reports and the latest information on local weather and traffic issues.
